---
title: "Assess the Data Source"
---

::: {.callout-note}
This page is under development.
:::

- Identify the reporting challenge and its predictability
- Understand the data structure and available history
- Obtaining [reporting triangles](../resources/glossary.qmd#reporting-triangle) in STLT settings: line lists with reference and [report dates](../resources/glossary.qmd#report-date), or successive snapshots of aggregate data
- Data versioning: automating downloads at fixed times, using version-controlled data platforms where available, archived PDF reports as fallback
- When ideal data aren't available: imputing missing [reference dates](../resources/glossary.qmd#reference-date) from other date fields, using sentinel data extrapolated to the population
- Handling rolling sums: need to recover daily or weekly counts before constructing a reporting triangle
